description: LAYER 3: % of employees using each deduction type.
definition:
WITH employee_deductions AS (
      SELECT DISTINCT
        rd.organization_id,
        rd.deduction_type_id,
        bv.user_id
      FROM payroll.run_deductions rd
      JOIN analytics.bv_run_payslips bv ON rd.payslip_id = bv.payslip_id
    ),
    org_employee_counts AS (
      SELECT
        organization_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS total_employees
      FROM analytics.bv_run_payslips
      GROUP BY 1
    )
    SELECT
      ed.organization_id,
      odt.name AS deduction_type,
      odt.is_pre_tax,
      oec.total_employees,
      COUNT(ed.user_id) AS employees_using,
      ROUND(
        COUNT(ed.user_id) * 100.0 / NULLIF(oec.total_employees, 0),
        2
      ) AS adoption_rate_pct
    FROM employee_deductions ed
    JOIN payroll.org_deduction_types odt ON ed.deduction_type_id = odt.id
    JOIN org_employee_counts oec ON ed.organization_id = oec.organization_id
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4;

description: LAYER 1: Organization payroll legal/financial details joined with identity.organization.
definition:
SELECT
      os.id,
      os.organization_id,
      o.name AS organization_name,
      o.subdomain,
      os.legal_name,
      os.tax_id_number,
      os.default_payment_bank_account_id,
      o.settings->'localization' AS localization,
      os.created_at,
      os.created_by
    FROM payroll.org_settings os
    JOIN identity.organizations o ON os.organization_id = o.id;

description: LAYER 3: Payment success rate per payroll run.
definition:
SELECT
      pt.organization_id,
      pb.payroll_run_id,
      r.pay_date,
      r.status AS run_status,
      COUNT(pt.id) AS total_transactions,
      COUNT(pt.id) FILTER (WHERE pt.status = 'success') AS successful_transactions,
      ROUND(
        COUNT(pt.id) FILTER (WHERE pt.status = 'success') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(pt.id), 0),
        2
      ) AS success_rate_pct
    FROM payroll.payment_transactions pt
    JOIN payroll.payment_batches pb ON pt.payment_batch_id = pb.id
    JOIN payroll.run_pay_cycles r ON pb.payroll_run_id = r.id
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4;

description: LAYER 1: Base view for process mining, calculating time spent in each workflow stage. Includes both completed stages and current stage durations.
definition:
WITH stage_timeline AS (
        SELECT 
            entity_id,
            entity_type,
            organization_id,
            to_stage_id as stage_name,
            created_at as stage_start,
            LEAD(created_at, 1) OVER (
                PARTITION BY entity_id 
                ORDER BY created_at
            ) as stage_end,
            LEAD(created_at, 1) OVER (
                PARTITION BY entity_id 
                ORDER BY created_at
            ) IS NULL as is_current
        FROM automation.esm_logs 
        WHERE to_stage_id IS NOT NULL
    )
    SELECT 
        st.entity_id,
        st.entity_type,
        st.organization_id,
        COALESCE(t.location_id, tsk.location_id) as location_id,
        st.stage_name,
        COALESCE(t.display_id, tsk.display_id, st.entity_id::text) as entity_name,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(st.stage_end, NOW()) - st.stage_start)) / 3600::NUMERIC as duration_hours,
        st.stage_start,
        COALESCE(st.stage_end, NOW()) as stage_end,
        st.is_current,
        CASE 
            WHEN st.is_current THEN 'In Progress'
            ELSE 'Completed'
        END as stage_status
    FROM stage_timeline st
    LEFT JOIN esm.v_tickets t ON st.entity_id = t.id AND st.entity_type = 'tickets'
    LEFT JOIN esm.v_work_orders tsk ON st.entity_id = tsk.id AND st.entity_type = 'tasks'
    WHERE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(st.stage_end, NOW()) - st.stage_start)) >= 0;

description: LAYER 1: Payslip summary with employee, organization, and payroll run details.
definition:
SELECT
      p.id AS payslip_id,
      p.organization_id,
      o.name AS organization_name,
      p.user_id,
      (u.details ->> 'firstName')::text || ' ' || (u.details ->> 'lastName')::text AS user_name,
      u.email,
      p.payroll_run_id,
      pr.period_start_date,
      pr.period_end_date,
      pr.pay_date,
      p.gross_pay,
      p.total_deductions,
      p.total_taxes,
      p.reimbursements,
      p.net_pay,
      p.created_at,
      p.created_by
    FROM payroll.run_payslips p
    JOIN identity.organizations o ON p.organization_id = o.id
    JOIN identity.users u ON p.user_id = u.id
    JOIN payroll.run_pay_cycles pr ON p.payroll_run_id = pr.id;

description: LAYER 1: Enriches user data with their primary role for analytics.
definition:
SELECT
        u.id AS user_id,
        u.name AS user_name,
        ou.organization_id,
        ou.location_id,
        ou.is_active,
        ou.role_status AS status, -- Corrected column name
        COALESCE(r.name, 'No Role') AS role_name,
        u.created_at
    FROM identity.users u
    LEFT JOIN identity.organization_users ou ON u.id = ou.user_id
    LEFT JOIN identity.user_roles ur ON ou.id = ur.organization_user_id
    LEFT JOIN identity.roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id
    WHERE ou.organization_id IS NOT NULL;

description: LAYER 3: High-level KPIs for asset health using a robust CTE pattern.
definition:
SELECT
        b.organization_id,
        b.location_id,
        COUNT(b.id) AS total_assets,
        COUNT(b.id) FILTER (WHERE b.contract_id IS NOT NULL) AS assets_under_contract,
        SUM(a.total_tickets) AS total_asset_tickets,
        AVG(a.total_tickets) AS tickets_per_asset
    FROM analytics.av_assets_summary a
    JOIN analytics.bv_assets b ON a.asset_id = b.id
    GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ((b.organization_id, b.location_id), (b.organization_id));

description: LAYER 2: Weekly payroll volume and value trends.
definition:
SELECT
      organization_id,
      date_trunc('week', pay_date)::date AS week_start,
      COUNT(payslip_id) AS payslips_count,
      SUM(gross_pay) AS total_gross,
      SUM(net_pay) AS total_net
    FROM analytics.bv_run_payslips
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ORDER BY week_start DESC;

description: Calculates Mean Time to Resolution (MTTR) for each ticket.
definition:
WITH resolution_times AS (
            SELECT
                dynamic_workflow_auditlogs.entity_id AS ticket_id,
                MAX(dynamic_workflow_auditlogs.created_at) AS resolved_at
            FROM dynamic_workflow_auditlogs
            WHERE dynamic_workflow_auditlogs.entity_type = 'tickets' AND dynamic_workflow_auditlogs.new_stage_name = 'Completed'
            GROUP BY dynamic_workflow_auditlogs.entity_id
        )
        SELECT
            t.id AS ticket_id,
            t.organization_id,
            t.location_id,
            t.created_at,
            rt.resolved_at,
            EXTRACT(epoch FROM rt.resolved_at - t.created_at) / 3600 AS mttr_hours
        FROM tickets t
        LEFT JOIN resolution_times rt ON t.id = rt.ticket_id;

description: LAYER 2: Payroll costs aggregated by team.
definition:
SELECT
      organization_id,
      pay_date,
      COUNT(payslip_id) AS headcount,
      AVG(gross_pay) AS avg_gross_pay,
      SUM(gross_pay) AS total_gross
    FROM analytics.bv_run_payslips
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ORDER BY pay_date DESC, total_gross DESC;

description: LAYER 2: Summarizes all ticket and task activity per account.
definition:
SELECT
        account_id,
        account_name,
        organization_id,
        location_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ticket_id) as total_tickets,
        SUM(task_work_hours) as total_work_hours,
        AVG(task_work_hours) as avg_work_hours_per_ticket
    FROM analytics.bv_tickets
    WHERE account_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ((account_id, account_name, organization_id, location_id), (account_id, account_name, organization_id));

description: KPI: Counts unique active contracts directly from the contracts view.
definition:
SELECT
        organization_id,
        location_id,
        COUNT(contract_id) AS active_contracts_count
    FROM analytics.bv_contracts
    WHERE is_active = true -- Corrected from is_currently_active
    GROUP BY organization_id, location_id;

description: LAYER 1: Base view for process mining, calculating time spent in each workflow stage.
definition:
WITH stage_logs AS (
      SELECT
        logs.entity_id, logs.entity_type, logs.organization_id, logs.previous_stage_name, logs.created_at,
        lag(logs.created_at, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY logs.entity_id ORDER BY logs.created_at) AS previous_stage_entry_at
      FROM workflow.dynamic_workflow_auditlogs AS logs
    )
    SELECT
      sl.entity_id, sl.entity_type, sl.organization_id,
      t.location_id, -- Exposing the location_id from the tickets table
      sl.previous_stage_name as stage_name,
      COALESCE(t.display_id, tsk.name) as entity_name,
      EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (sl.created_at - sl.previous_stage_entry_at)) / 3600 AS duration_hours
    FROM stage_logs AS sl
    LEFT JOIN blueprint.tickets AS t ON sl.entity_id = t.id AND sl.entity_type = 'tickets'
    LEFT JOIN blueprint.tasks AS tsk ON sl.entity_id = tsk.id AND sl.entity_type = 'tasks'
    WHERE sl.previous_stage_name IS NOT NULL;

description: LAYER 3: Employees with no tax settings (potential compliance risk).
definition:
SELECT
      organization_id,
      COUNT(*) AS employees_without_tax_settings
    FROM analytics.bv_emp_pay_settings
    WHERE tax_settings IS NULL OR tax_settings = '{}'::jsonb
    GROUP BY 1;

description: LAYER 2: Monthly totals by earning type (salary, bonus, overtime).
definition:
SELECT
      re.organization_id,
      bv.pay_date,
      date_trunc('month', bv.pay_date)::date AS pay_month,
      oet.name AS earning_type,
      SUM(re.amount) AS total_amount
    FROM payroll.run_earnings re
    JOIN payroll.org_earning_types oet ON re.earning_type_id = oet.id
    JOIN analytics.bv_run_payslips bv ON re.payslip_id = bv.payslip_id
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
    ORDER BY pay_month DESC, earning_type;

description: Calculates the time spent in each stage for tickets and tasks.
definition:
WITH stage_logs AS (
            SELECT
                logs.entity_id,
                logs.entity_type,
                logs.organization_id,
                logs.previous_stage_name,
                logs.created_at,
                LAG(logs.created_at, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY logs.entity_id ORDER BY logs.created_at) AS previous_stage_entry_at
            FROM dynamic_workflow_auditlogs logs
        )
        SELECT
            sl.entity_id,
            sl.entity_type,
            sl.organization_id,
            sl.previous_stage_name AS stage_name,
            COALESCE(t.display_id, tsk.name) AS entity_name,
            EXTRACT(epoch FROM sl.created_at - sl.previous_stage_entry_at) / 3600 AS duration_hours
        FROM stage_logs sl
        LEFT JOIN tickets t ON sl.entity_id = t.id AND sl.entity_type = 'tickets'
        LEFT JOIN blueprint.tasks tsk ON sl.entity_id = tsk.id AND sl.entity_type = 'tasks'
        WHERE sl.previous_stage_name IS NOT NULL;

description: LAYER 2: Monthly aggregation of fleet distance, active agents, and average travel times.
definition:
SELECT 
        organization_id,
        to_char(date, 'YYYY-MM') AS month_year,
        date_trunc('month', date) AS month_start_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS active_agents_count,
        SUM(total_distance_km) AS total_fleet_distance_km,
        ROUND(AVG(total_distance_km), 2) AS avg_distance_per_agent_km,
        SUM(total_duration_hours) AS total_fleet_hours,
        SUM(stop_count) AS total_stops_visited
    FROM analytics.bv_agent_daily_log
    GROUP BY organization_id, to_char(date, 'YYYY-MM'), date_trunc('month', date)

description: LAYER 3: % of payroll attributed to overtime earnings.
definition:
WITH overtime AS (
      SELECT organization_id, pay_month, total_amount AS overtime_amount
      FROM analytics.av_earning_type_trends
      WHERE earning_type = 'Overtime'
    ),
    payroll_totals AS (
      SELECT organization_id, pay_date, total_gross_pay
      FROM analytics.av_payroll_run_summary
    )
    SELECT
      ot.organization_id,
      ot.pay_month,
      ot.overtime_amount,
      pt.total_gross_pay,
      ROUND(
        ot.overtime_amount * 100.0 / NULLIF(pt.total_gross_pay, 0),
        2
      ) AS overtime_pct_of_payroll
    FROM overtime ot
    JOIN payroll_totals pt 
      ON ot.organization_id = pt.organization_id
      AND ot.pay_month = pt.pay_date::date;

description: LAYER 2: Analyzes process bottlenecks by aggregating time spent in each workflow stage.
definition:
SELECT
      stage_name, entity_type, organization_id, location_id,
      AVG(duration_hours) AS average_duration_hours,
      MAX(duration_hours) AS max_duration_hours,
      COUNT(*) AS total_occurrences
    FROM analytics.bv_stage_durations
    GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ((stage_name, entity_type, organization_id, location_id), (stage_name, entity_type, organization_id));

description: LAYER 2: Total payroll (gross, net) grouped by location.
definition:
SELECT
      organization_id,
      pay_date,
      COUNT(payslip_id) AS employee_count,
      SUM(gross_pay) AS total_gross,
      SUM(net_pay) AS total_net
    FROM analytics.bv_run_payslips
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ORDER BY pay_date DESC, total_gross DESC;

description: LAYER 2: Calculates key metrics per-ticket using a robust CTE pattern.
definition:
SELECT
        ticket_id,
        organization_id,
        location_id,
        ticket_stage_id,
        ticket_created_at AS created_at,
        ticket_resolved_at AS resolved_at,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ticket_resolved_at - ticket_created_at)) / 3600 AS mttr_hours,
        COUNT(DISTINCT task_id) AS task_count,
        SUM(task_work_hours) AS total_work_hours
    FROM analytics.bv_tickets
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6;

description: LAYER 1: Provides a clean, enriched list of customer accounts.
definition:
SELECT
        o.id AS account_id,
        o.name AS account_name,
        o.organization_id,
        NULL AS location_id,
        TRUE AS is_active,
        o.settings->>'industry' AS industry,
        o.created_at
    FROM identity.organizations o;

description: LAYER 1: Enriched employee payroll profile with tax settings, pay schedule, location, team, and primary bank account.
definition:
SELECT
      eps.id,
      eps.organization_id,
      o.name AS organization_name,
      eps.user_id,
      (u.details ->> 'firstName')::text || ' ' || (u.details ->> 'lastName')::text AS user_name,
      u.email,
      eps.pay_type,
      eps.salary_amount,
      eps.hourly_rate,
      ps.id AS pay_schedule_id,
      ps.name AS pay_schedule_name,
      l.id AS location_id,
      l.name AS location_name,
      t.id AS team_id,
      t.name AS team_name,
      eps.tax_settings,
      ba.account_number_encrypted AS primary_account_encrypted,
      ba.routing_number AS primary_routing_number,
      eps.created_at,
      eps.created_by
    FROM payroll.emp_pay_settings eps
    JOIN identity.organizations o ON eps.organization_id = o.id
    JOIN identity.users u ON eps.user_id = u.id
    LEFT JOIN payroll.org_pay_schedules ps ON eps.pay_schedule_id = ps.id
    LEFT JOIN identity.locations l ON eps.location_id = l.id
    LEFT JOIN identity.teams t ON eps.team_id = t.id
    LEFT JOIN payroll.emp_accounts ba 
      ON eps.user_id = ba.user_id 
      AND eps.organization_id = ba.organization_id 
      AND ba.is_primary = true;

description: LAYER 2: Detailed tax amounts by jurisdiction, tax type, and payroll run.
definition:
SELECT
      rt.organization_id,
      bv.payroll_run_id,
      bv.pay_date,
      ott.jurisdiction,
      ott.name AS tax_type_name,
      SUM(rt.amount_employee) AS total_employee_tax,
      SUM(rt.amount_employer) AS total_employer_tax,
      SUM(rt.taxable_wage) AS total_taxable_wage
    FROM payroll.run_taxes rt
    JOIN payroll.org_tax_types ott ON rt.tax_type_id = ott.id
    JOIN analytics.bv_run_payslips bv ON rt.payslip_id = bv.payslip_id
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
    ORDER BY pay_date DESC, jurisdiction, tax_type_name;

description: Rolls up ticket and task data to provide high-level KPIs for each account.
definition:
SELECT
            ats.organization_id,
            ats.account_id,
            ats.account_name,
            ats.total_tickets,
            ats.open_tickets,
            ats.avg_resolution_hours,
            SUM(tts.task_count) AS total_tasks_for_account,
            SUM(tts.total_task_hours) AS total_hours_spent_on_tasks
        FROM mv_account_ticket_summary ats
        LEFT JOIN tickets t ON ats.account_id = t.account_id
        LEFT JOIN mv_ticket_task_summary tts ON t.id = tts.ticket_id
        GROUP BY ats.organization_id, ats.account_id, ats.account_name, ats.total_tickets, ats.open_tickets, ats.avg_resolution_hours;

description: LAYER 2: Summarizes work done by each agent on a daily basis.
definition:
SELECT
            agent_id, agent_name, organization_id, location_id,
            DATE(task_actual_start) AS work_date,
            COUNT(DISTINCT task_id) AS tasks_completed,
            SUM(task_work_hours) AS total_hours_worked
        FROM analytics.bv_tickets
        WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND task_work_hours IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY agent_id, agent_name, organization_id, location_id, DATE(task_actual_start);

description: Summarizes ticket counts and resolution times per account.
definition:
SELECT
            acc.organization_id,
            acc.id AS account_id,
            acc.name AS account_name,
            COUNT(t.id) AS total_tickets,
            COUNT(t.id) FILTER (WHERE t.stage_id NOT IN ('Resolved', 'Closed')) AS open_tickets,
            AVG(EXTRACT(epoch FROM t.resolved_at - t.reported_at) / 3600) AS avg_resolution_hours
        FROM external.accounts acc
        LEFT JOIN tickets t ON acc.id = t.account_id
        GROUP BY acc.organization_id, acc.id, acc.name;

description: Determines the final stage for each task based on workflow audit logs.
definition:
WITH last_stage AS (
            SELECT
                dynamic_workflow_auditlogs.entity_id AS task_id,
                dynamic_workflow_auditlogs.new_stage_name AS final_stage,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY dynamic_workflow_auditlogs.entity_id ORDER BY dynamic_workflow_auditlogs.created_at DESC) AS rn
            FROM dynamic_workflow_auditlogs
            WHERE dynamic_workflow_auditlogs.entity_type = 'tasks'
        )
        SELECT
            tsk.id AS task_id,
            tsk.organization_id,
            tsk.ticket_id,
            tsk.location_id,
            ls.final_stage
        FROM blueprint.tasks tsk
        LEFT JOIN last_stage ls ON tsk.id = ls.task_id AND ls.rn = 1;

description: AGGREGATE: Trends total and completed tickets by week.
definition:
SELECT
        organization_id,
        location_id,
        date_trunc('week', ticket_created_at)::date AS week_start_date,
        COUNT(ticket_id) AS total_tickets,
        COUNT(ticket_id) FILTER (WHERE ticket_stage_id IN ('Completed', 'Resolved', 'completed')) AS completed_tickets
    FROM analytics.bv_tickets
    GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ((organization_id, location_id, 3), (organization_id, 3))
    ORDER BY 3;

description: Master view combining ticket, asset, and lifecycle data for KPI analysis.
definition:
SELECT
            t.id AS ticket_id,
            t.display_id AS ticket_display_id,
            t.stage_id AS ticket_stage_id,
            t.created_at AS ticket_created_at,
            acc.id AS account_id,
            acc.name AS account_name,
            sa.id AS asset_id,
            sa.display_id AS asset_display_id,
            cat.name AS asset_category_name,
            COALESCE(tlt.hours_to_first_task, 0) AS hours_to_first_task,
            COALESCE(tlt.hours_to_practical_resolution, 0) AS hours_to_practical_resolution,
            COALESCE(tlt.hours_observation_period, 0) AS hours_observation_period,
            COALESCE(trc.reschedule_count, 0) AS reschedule_count,
            t.organization_id,
            t.location_id
        FROM tickets t
        LEFT JOIN external.accounts acc ON t.account_id = acc.id
        LEFT JOIN external.service_assets sa ON t.asset_id = sa.id
        LEFT JOIN catalog.asset_categories cat ON sa.category_id = cat.id
        LEFT JOIN mv_ticket_lifecycle_times tlt ON t.id = tlt.ticket_id
        LEFT JOIN mv_ticket_reschedule_counts trc ON t.id = trc.ticket_id;

description: LAYER 2: Aggregates agent effectiveness KPIs (FTFR, MTTR) over time.
definition:
SELECT
        bv.agent_id,
        u.name AS agent_name,
        bv.organization_id,
        bv.location_id,
        AVG(av.mttr_hours) AS average_mttr_hours,
        (COUNT(DISTINCT bv.ticket_id) FILTER (WHERE av.task_count = 1)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT bv.ticket_id), 0)) * 100 AS first_time_fix_rate_pct,
        COUNT(DISTINCT bv.ticket_id) AS total_tickets_handled,
        SUM(bv.task_work_hours) AS total_hours_worked
    FROM analytics.bv_tickets bv
    JOIN analytics.av_tickets_summary av ON bv.ticket_id = av.ticket_id
    LEFT JOIN identity.users u ON bv.agent_id = u.id
    WHERE bv.agent_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY bv.agent_id, u.name, bv.organization_id, bv.location_id;

description: LAYER 2: Monthly pay history per employee (net, gross, deductions).
definition:
SELECT
      organization_id,
      user_id,
      user_name,
      date_trunc('month', pay_date)::date AS pay_month,
      COUNT(payslip_id) AS payslip_count,
      SUM(gross_pay) AS total_gross,
      SUM(total_deductions) AS total_deductions,
      SUM(net_pay) AS total_net_pay
    FROM analytics.bv_run_payslips
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
    ORDER BY pay_month DESC;

description: LAYER 1: Payroll run with schedule, totals, and processing user.
definition:
SELECT
      r.id AS payroll_run_id,
      r.organization_id,
      o.name AS organization_name,
      r.pay_schedule_id,
      ps.name AS pay_schedule_name,
      r.period_start_date,
      r.period_end_date,
      r.pay_date,
      r.status,
      r.total_gross_pay,
      r.total_deductions,
      r.total_taxes,
      r.total_net_pay,
      u.email AS processed_by_email,
      r.processed_at,
      r.created_at,
      r.created_by
    FROM payroll.run_pay_cycles r
    JOIN identity.organizations o ON r.organization_id = o.id
    JOIN payroll.org_pay_schedules ps ON r.pay_schedule_id = ps.id
    LEFT JOIN identity.users u ON r.processed_by_user_id = u.id;

description: KPI: Total distance covered by the entire fleet for the current day.
definition:
SELECT 
        organization_id,
        SUM(total_distance_km) AS value,
        'Total Distance (Today)' AS label,
        'km' AS unit,
        COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS contributing_agents
    FROM analytics.bv_agent_daily_log
    WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY organization_id

description: Aggregates the total hours worked by each agent on a given day.
definition:
SELECT
            tsk.organization_id,
            tsk.location_id,
            DATE(tsk.actual_start_time) AS work_date,
            tsk.assignee_id,
            u.name AS assignee_name,
            SUM(EXTRACT(epoch FROM tsk.actual_end_time - tsk.actual_start_time) / 3600) AS total_hours_worked
        FROM blueprint.tasks tsk
        JOIN identity.users u ON tsk.assignee_id = u.id
        WHERE tsk.actual_start_time IS NOT NULL AND tsk.actual_end_time IS NOT NULL AND tsk.assignee_id IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY tsk.organization_id, tsk.location_id, DATE(tsk.actual_start_time), tsk.assignee_id, u.name;

description: LAYER 1: Enriches the physical route summary table with user details and formatted locations.
definition:
SELECT 
        s.id AS summary_id,
        s.date,
        s.organization_id,
        s.user_id,
        u.details->>'firstName' || ' ' || u.details->>'lastName' AS agent_name,
        u.email,
        s.total_distance_km,
        s.total_duration_hours,
        s.stop_count,
        s.details->>'start_location' AS start_location_address,
        s.details->>'end_location' AS end_location_address,
        s.created_at,
        s.updated_at
    FROM logistics.daily_route_summaries s
    LEFT JOIN identity.users u ON s.user_id = u.id

description: LAYER 2: Aggregated totals per payroll run (employees, gross, net).
definition:
SELECT
      prc.payroll_run_id,
      prc.organization_id,
      prc.organization_name,
      prc.pay_schedule_name,
      prc.period_start_date,
      prc.pay_date,
      prc.status,
      COUNT(bv.payslip_id) AS employee_count,
      SUM(bv.gross_pay) AS total_gross_pay,
      SUM(bv.total_deductions) AS total_deductions,
      SUM(bv.net_pay) AS total_net_pay
    FROM analytics.bv_run_pay_cycles prc
    JOIN analytics.bv_run_payslips bv ON prc.payroll_run_id = bv.payroll_run_id
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7

description: LAYER 3: Provides all high-level operational KPIs from a single source.
definition:
SELECT
        organization_id,
        location_id,
        COUNT(ticket_id) AS total_tickets,
        COUNT(ticket_id) FILTER (WHERE ticket_stage_id IN ('Resolved', 'Closed', 'completed')) AS resolved_tickets_count,
        COUNT(ticket_id) FILTER (WHERE ticket_stage_id NOT IN ('Resolved', 'Closed', 'completed', 'Canceled')) AS open_tickets_count,
        AVG(mttr_hours) AS average_mttr_hours,
        AVG(task_count) AS average_tasks_per_ticket,
        (COUNT(ticket_id) FILTER (WHERE task_count = 1)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(ticket_id), 0)) * 100 AS first_time_fix_rate_pct
    FROM analytics.av_tickets_summary
    GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ((organization_id, location_id), (organization_id));

description: LAYER 2: A comprehensive, detailed list of all assets with their related dimensions and metrics.
definition:
WITH asset_ticket_metrics AS (
        SELECT
            asset_id,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ticket_id) as total_tickets,
            SUM(task_work_hours) as total_work_hours
        FROM analytics.bv_tickets
        WHERE asset_id IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY asset_id
    )
    SELECT
        bva.id as asset_id,
        bva.asset_display_id,
        bva.organization_id,
        bva.location_id,
        bva.account_id,
        bva.account_name,
        bva.asset_category_name,
        bvc.contract_id,
        bvc.contract_display_id,
        COALESCE(atm.total_tickets, 0) as total_tickets,
        atm.total_work_hours
    FROM analytics.bv_assets bva
    LEFT JOIN analytics.bv_contracts bvc ON bva.contract_id = bvc.contract_id
    LEFT JOIN asset_ticket_metrics atm ON bva.id = atm.asset_id;

description: Provides a simple count of tasks associated with each ticket.
definition:
SELECT
            t.id AS ticket_id,
            t.organization_id,
            t.location_id,
            COUNT(tsk.id) AS task_count
        FROM blueprint.tickets t
        LEFT JOIN blueprint.tasks tsk ON t.id = tsk.ticket_id
        GROUP BY t.id, t.organization_id, t.location_id;

description: Calculates task counts and total task duration for each ticket.
definition:
SELECT
            t.organization_id,
            t.location_id,
            t.id AS ticket_id,
            t.display_id AS ticket_display_id,
            COUNT(tsk.id) AS task_count,
            SUM(EXTRACT(epoch FROM tsk.actual_end_time - tsk.actual_start_time) / 3600) AS total_task_hours
        FROM tickets t
        LEFT JOIN blueprint.tasks tsk ON t.id = tsk.ticket_id
        GROUP BY t.organization_id, t.location_id, t.id, t.display_id;

description: Calculates key lifecycle durations for a ticket, like time to first task.
definition:
WITH first_task AS (
            SELECT t_1.id AS ticket_id, MIN(tsk.created_at) AS first_task_created_at
            FROM tickets t_1
            LEFT JOIN blueprint.tasks tsk ON t_1.id = tsk.ticket_id
            GROUP BY t_1.id
        ), first_report AS (
            SELECT tsk.ticket_id, MIN(sr.created_at) AS first_report_submitted_at
            FROM blueprint.tasks tsk
            LEFT JOIN organization.service_reports sr ON tsk.id = sr.task_id
            GROUP BY tsk.ticket_id
        )
        SELECT
            t.id AS ticket_id,
            t.organization_id,
            t.location_id,
            EXTRACT(epoch FROM ft.first_task_created_at - t.created_at) / 3600 AS hours_to_first_task,
            EXTRACT(epoch FROM fr.first_report_submitted_at - t.created_at) / 3600 AS hours_to_practical_resolution,
            EXTRACT(epoch FROM t.resolved_at - fr.first_report_submitted_at) / 3600 AS hours_observation_period
        FROM tickets t
        LEFT JOIN first_task ft ON t.id = ft.ticket_id
        LEFT JOIN first_report fr ON t.id = fr.ticket_id;

description: LAYER 1: Enriches contract data with status, duration, and account details.
definition:
SELECT
        c.id AS contract_id,
        c.display_id AS contract_display_id,
        c.organization_id,
        c.location_id,
        c.account_id,
        c.account_display AS account_name,
        c.start_date,
        c.end_date,
        c.is_active,
        (c.end_date - c.start_date) AS duration_days
    FROM esm.v_contracts c;

description: Counts the total number of times tasks for a ticket have been scheduled.
definition:
SELECT
            t.id AS ticket_id,
            t.organization_id,
            t.location_id,
            COUNT(audit.id) AS reschedule_count
        FROM tickets t
        LEFT JOIN blueprint.tasks tsk ON t.id = tsk.ticket_id
        LEFT JOIN dynamic_workflow_auditlogs audit ON tsk.id = audit.entity_id
            AND audit.entity_type = 'blueprint.tasks'
            AND audit.new_stage_name = 'Scheduled'
        GROUP BY t.id, t.organization_id, t.location_id;

description: LAYER 3: Employees with deductions >50% of gross pay (flag for review).
definition:
SELECT
      organization_id,
      pay_date,
      COUNT(*) AS high_deduction_employee_count
    FROM analytics.bv_run_payslips
    WHERE total_deductions > (gross_pay * 0.5)
    GROUP BY 1, 2;

description: LAYER 3: Checks if GL entries balance (debits = credits) per payroll run.
definition:
SELECT
      gl.organization_id,
      gl.payroll_run_id,
      prc.pay_date,
      prc.status AS run_status,
      SUM(gl.debit_amount) AS total_debits,
      SUM(gl.credit_amount) AS total_credits,
      ROUND(
        ABS(SUM(gl.debit_amount) - SUM(gl.credit_amount)),
        2
      ) AS imbalance_amount,
      CASE
        WHEN ABS(SUM(gl.debit_amount) - SUM(gl.credit_amount)) <= 0.01 THEN 'Balanced'
        ELSE 'Imbalanced'
      END AS reconciliation_status
    FROM payroll.payment_gl_entries gl
    JOIN analytics.bv_run_pay_cycles prc ON gl.payroll_run_id = prc.payroll_run_id
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4;

description: LAYER 1: Enriches assets with real-time last visit data from the tasks table.
definition:
SELECT
        a.id,
        a.organization_id,
        a.location_id,
        a.display_id AS asset_display_id,
        a.description,
        a.is_active,
        a.account_id,
        a.account_display AS account_name,
        cat.name AS asset_category_name,
        a.last_visit_date,
        a.contract_id
    FROM esm.v_service_assets a
    LEFT JOIN catalog.asset_categories cat ON a.category_id = cat.id;

description: LAYER 1: Foundational view joining tickets and tasks to the enriched bv_assets view.
definition:
SELECT 
        t.id AS ticket_id, 
        t.display_id AS ticket_display_id, 
        t.status AS ticket_stage_id, 
        t.created_at AS ticket_created_at, 
        t.resolved_at AS ticket_resolved_at, 
        t.organization_id, 
        t.location_id, 
        tsk.id AS task_id, 
        tsk.status AS task_stage_id, 
        tsk.scheduled_start AS task_actual_start, 
        tsk.assignee_id AS agent_id, 
        NULL AS agent_name, 
        (tsk.duration_actual_minutes / 60.0) AS task_work_hours,
        bva.id AS asset_id, 
        bva.asset_display_id, 
        bva.asset_category_name, 
        bva.account_id, 
        bva.account_name 
    FROM esm.v_tickets AS t 
    LEFT JOIN esm.v_work_orders AS tsk ON t.id = tsk.ticket_id
    LEFT JOIN analytics.bv_assets AS bva ON t.asset_id = bva.id;
